ingest_command: bcftools view nstd166.GRCh38.variant_call.vcf.gz | bcftools annotate -x '^INFO/SVTYPE,INFO/AF,INFO/SVLEN,INFO/END' | llmap variant-ingest --source dbvar --kind sv --bucket-bp 100 --output dbvar.priors
notes: Aggregates SV submissions from many studies; reciprocal-overlap verification target for novel-SV review. Used in IGHG pipeline phase D.
